mapper.sql: id ,experiment_num,region_num,pd_implement_code, seed_num,project_code,vector_task_code, species_code,breed_code,target_character, generation_code,tc_gene,region_area, area_unit,plant_space,rows_number, rows_length,rows_space,seeding_type, seeding_number,seeding_unit,seeding_time, remark,task_num,create_user_id, create_user_name,create_time,emergence_rate, transplant_time
mapper.insert:
insert into tc_experiment_design_tb(id,experiment_num,region_num, seed_num,project_code,vector_task_code, species_code,breed_code,target_character, generation_code,tc_gene,region_area, area_unit,plant_space,rows_number, rows_length,rows_space,seeding_type, seeding_number,seeding_unit,seeding_time, remark,task_num,create_user_id, create_user_name,create_time,emergence_rate, transplant_time,pd_implement_code) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.experimentNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.regionNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.seedNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.vectorTaskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.speciesCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.breedCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.targetCharacter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.generationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.tcGene,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.regionArea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.areaUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.plantSpace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.rowsNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.rowsLength,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.rowsSpace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.seedingType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.seedingNumber,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.seedingUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.seedingTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.taskNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.createUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.createUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{item.emergenceRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.transplantTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.pdImplementCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select DISTINCT vector_task_code, pd_implement_code, experiment_num from tc_experiment_design_tb where vector_task_code is not null or pd_implement_code is not null
